---
name: 📝 Documentation
about: Report a docs issue or suggest improvements
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ["documentation"]
---

## 📝 What needs improvement?

Which doc page? (README, CONTRIBUTING, code comments, etc.)

## 🐛 What's wrong?

Is the docs inaccurate? Outdated? Missing? Confusing?

## ✏️ Suggested change

What should it say instead? (Paste the corrected text if you have it.)

## 📍 Location

Section / heading / line number where the issue is.
